metadata.description: The brand-crew marketplace for ai.thesatyajit.com — an installable Claude crew (skills, slash commands, agents, hooks) that maintains the AI-native personal site.

plugins.name: brand-crew
plugins.description: Skills, slash commands, agents, and a validate hook that author on-brand content and update typed data records for ai.thesatyajit.com. Everything self-validates with pnpm validate and ships via PR; social is drafted, never auto-posted.
